name: list_dir
description: List directory as a tree string up to a maximum depth and entry count; If index.md exists in the listed directory, append its content at the end.

max_depth.description: Max expansion depth below dir_path (1: include only direct children; 2: include grandchildren; etc.).

show_info.description: Whether to compute and display (depth,size) for each directory, where depth is the max depth to leaf directory under that directory and size is the total number of entries (files+dirs) in its subtree. Both are computed on the full subtree and are independent of max_depth. Default true; set false to speed up very large directories.
